## **Asynchronous FIFO (async\_fifo)**

* Implemented in Verilog for transferring data safely between independent read and write clocks.  
* Parameterizable: configurable depth, data width, and pointer size.  
* Write controller:  
  * Manages write pointer and full detection.  
  * Writes only when FIFO is not full.  
  * Synchronizes read pointer from read clock domain.  
* Read controller:  
  * Manages read pointer and empty detection.  
  * Reads only when FIFO is not empty.  
  * Synchronizes write pointer from write clock domain.  
* FIFO memory block stores data indexed by read and write pointers.  
* Formal verification: assertions, assumptions, and cover properties ensure correct behavior.

![][image1]

## **SystemVerilog Assertions Listing:**

| SVA Type | Description | Status |
| ----- | ----- | ----- |
| Assertion | Check that FIFO does not write when full (`!(internal_w_en && full)`) | PASS |
| Assertion | Check that FIFO does not read when empty (`!(internal_r_en && empty)`) | PASS |
| Assertion | Write pointer does not exceed depth (`waddr <= DEPTH`) | PASS |
| Assumption | Environment does not assert read when FIFO is empty (`!(r_en && empty)`) | PASS |
| Assumption | Environment does not assert write when FIFO is full (`!(w_en && full)`) | PASS |
| Cover | FIFO can become full after being empty (\`empty | \=\> full\`) PASS |
| Cover | FIFO can become empty after being full (\`full | \=\> empty\`) PASS |

Cover 

**SBY 17:49:20 \[fifo\_cover\] summary: engine\_0 (smtbmc) returned pass**  
**SBY 17:49:20 \[fifo\_cover\] summary: cover trace: fifo\_cover/engine\_0/trace0.vcd**  
**SBY 17:49:20 \[fifo\_cover\] summary:   reached cover statement async\_fifo.cover\_fifo\_fill at async\_fifo.v:79.1-79.39**  
**SBY 17:49:20 \[fifo\_cover\] summary: cover trace: fifo\_cover/engine\_0/trace1.vcd**  
**SBY 17:49:20 \[fifo\_cover\] summary:   reached cover statement async\_fifo.cover\_fifo\_drain at async\_fifo.v:80.1-80.41**  
**SBY 17:49:20 \[fifo\_cover\] DONE (PASS, rc=0)**

**Testbench waveform**

![][image4]

Reproduction Steps for Symbiyosys

1- In the terminal, source the \<PATH-TO\>oss-cad-suite/environment 

2- Once the environment is activated, cd to the path of the folder of the implemented FIFO with all of the relevant files/modules.  
3- Open the folder (that has all the FIFO files) in VS Code and create a new file in the same folder named ***“fifo.sby”***  
4- Add the script of the “fifo.sby” into the file, and run the following command from the terminal ***“sby \-f fifo.sby”***  
5- After the command executes, the terminal should show the results PASS for bmc, cover, and prove.  
6- To view the cover properties in GTKwave, type the following command in the terminal:  
***gtkwave fifo\_cover/engine\_0/trace0.vcd*** for the empty coverage trace.  
***gtkwave fifo\_cover/engine\_0/trace1.vcd*** for the full coverage trace.
